best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-navigation-001 title: verify navigation between activities module: navigation source pages: 1 preconditions: application is launched. test data: test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. verify navigation from mainactivity to signinactivity. 3. verify navigation from mainactivity to userlistactivity. expected result: navigation between activities should work as expected.

test case id: tc-trekkingsequence-001 title: verify trekking functionality works as expected module: trekking source pages: 3 preconditions: application is launched and user is signed in. test data: valid province name. test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. tap on the "trekking" button. 3. select a valid province. 4. verify route list for the selected province is displayed. 5. tap on a route in the list. 6. verify the selected route is processed. expected result: route list and selected route should be displayed correctly.
